official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_display_objective clear-slot body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_display_objective to packet id 0x62.
The clear-slot fixture body is a DisplaySlot id VarInt followed by an empty objective name string.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, slot/objective presence fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer scoreboard Objective state or scoreboard display behavior.
